title: Colombia Downgraded by S&P Ratings Amid Growing Fiscal Concerns
summary: Colombia’s credit score was downgraded by S&P Global Ratings for the second time in less than a year on concerns over a persistently large fiscal deficit and high debt burden.

title: Coldwell's Waugh: Uncertainty Driving Housing Market
summary: Coldwell Banker Affiliates President Jason Waugh discusses housing stocks bracing for the spring selling season, ‘healthy and strong’ demand, and why uncertainty is driving the market. He talks with Katie Greifeld and Romaine Bostick on “the Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BTG Deal to Buy Digimais Said to Get Insurance Fund Support
summary: Banco BTG Pactual SA’s deal to buy Banco Digimais SA, a struggling Brazilian lender in need of capital, is getting support from the FGC, the nation’s deposit insurance fund, according to people familiar with the matter.

Chile Uncovers Criminal Networks Shipping Millions of Dollars of Copper to Peru and China
summary: Chilean investigators have exposed how organized criminal groups steal, process and ship copper on a previously unreported scale as perpetrators seek to capitalize on high metal prices.

title: Emerging Assets Surge to Multi-Year Highs on US-Iran Truce
summary: Emerging-market assets from Asia to Latin America surged in a broad-based rally on Wednesday, notching their strongest session in years after a US–Iran ceasefire sent oil prices tumbling and unleashed a wave of global risk appetite.
